data.title: engage2learn Acquires Education Elements to Expand Its Instructional Leadership Support for K-12 Districts
data.description: engage2learn ("e2L"), a prominent company based in Austin, Texas, has recently expanded its services by acquiring a new entity specializing in district strategy and instructional design. This move solidifies e2L's commitment to supporting instructional leaders by offering a wider range of expertise. The acquisition took place on April 16, 2026. Through this strategic decision, e2L aims to enhance its offerings for leadership coaching, teacher development, and data insights. This development marks a significant step in e2L's growth, reflecting its dedication to providing comprehensive support for educational institutions.

data.title: BauerFinancial Awards Peak Credit Union 5-Star Superior Rating for 60th Consecutive Quarter
data.description: Peak Credit Union has recently received a top rating from BauerFinancial, Inc., showcasing its ongoing strength, stability, and financial performance. The rating reflects the credit union's consistent excellence in operations. Based in Coral Gables, Florida, the institution has demonstrated its robust standing in the industry. This recognition underscores Peak Credit Union's dedication to providing quality services to its members. Congratulations to Peak Credit Union for this achievement.

data.title: Hubbell Advances Critical Infrastructure for Grid Modernization at IEEE PES T&D 2026
data.description: SHELTON, Conn. - In an announcement on April 16, 2026, a company is set to showcase its latest offerings, including 765 kV-ready solutions, the LineDefender single-phase recloser, and motor-operated AIS switchgear. Additionally, the company will also highlight its most recent acquisition. This showcase comes as utilities upgrade their grids to enhance support for electrification, reliability, and long-term sustainability.

data.title: DRAGEN v4.5 supports Illumina's new TruPath Genome and 5-base assays, drives insights across germline, oncology, and multiomic workflows
data.description: Illumina has released the latest version of DRAGEN, called v4.5, which aims to uncover intricate biological data in challenging sample types and complex regions for rare disease and oncology research. The updated software includes a new pangenome representation, default personalization options, and machine learning features to enhance analytical capabilities across various applications. This release signifies a significant advancement in genetic analysis, offering improved tools for researchers to delve deeper into complex biological signals.

data.title: Oma Savings Bank Plc: Resolutions of the organizing meeting of the Board of Directors
data.description: On April 16, 2026 at 4:10 PM EEST, Oma Savings Bank PLC released information regarding changes in their board, management, and auditors.

data.title: DUOL SHAREHOLDER REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Duolingo
data.description: Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced notable losses in Duolingo to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their available options. If you have suffered significant losses in Duolingo stock or options and wish to explore your legal avenues, do not hesitate to contact him.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- John Diaz, MD/
data.description: Prominent plastic surgeon Dr. John Diaz, known for his work in Beverly Hills, is extending his renowned expertise to New York City. The announcement was made on 07-Apr-2026 by Dr. Diaz. It has been noted that the media contact information should have been available on public platforms.

data.title: PlanPort Delivers Targeted AI Capability to Support Ascensus Plan Document Review
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, PlanPort, a prominent platform for smart retirement plan document analysis, has revealed that Ascensus, a key player in America’s savings network, has started utilizing PlanPort’s AI-powered platform for specific operational processes linked to reviewing retirement plan documents. This feature aims to simplify document processing while upholding Ascensus’ established review criteria and stringent quality measures. Through this collaboration, Ascensus is anticipated to optimize its operational efficiency in this realm.

data.title: Quibble Becomes First Publisher Certified by Proudly Human, Marking Major Milestone for Human-Created Content in the Age of AI
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia and Zurich, on April 16, 2026 - Proudly Human has named Quibble as the first officially certified publisher of entirely human-created content globally. This comes as a significant development amid the surge of AI-generated content across various platforms. The certification marks a turning point in the industry...

data.title: Beyond Meat® Partners with Big Geyser—One of the Nation’s Largest Non-Alcoholic Beverage Distributors
data.description: A wide-ranging distribution deal has been secured for Beyond Immerse™, the brand’s inaugural functional beverage line. This agreement grants entry into over 26,000 retail locations throughout the New York metropolitan area.

data.title: Fox Factory Holding Corp. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: In Duluth, Georgia, on April 16, 2026, Fox Factory Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: FOXF), a renowned brand known for its performance products worldwide, will release their first quarter results for the period ending April 3, 2026. These results will be disclosed on Thursday, May 7, 2026, post-market closure. Fox Factory is a leading global company specializing in designing, engineering, and producing high-quality products and systems for a broad customer base. Stay tuned for the financial report coming soon.

data.title: El Pollo Loco Holdings, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: A company based in Costa Mesa, California, known as El Pollo Loco Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOCO), shared that they will hold a conference call to review their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. The call will feature Liz Williams, the Chief Executive Officer, and Ira Fils, the Chief Financial Officer. Following the market's closure on the same day, a press release detailing their first quarter financial results will be made available.

data.title: DAT brings focus on workflow automation and market intelligence to 2026 TIA Capital Ideas Conference
data.description: DAT will be present at the Transportation Intermediaries Association (TIA) event in 2026, offering reliable capacity, automated services, and up-to-date information to adapt to the unpredictable market conditions.

data.title: Bit Origin Ltd Announces Strategic Financing to Explore Expansion into AI Computing and Data Center Services
data.description: Bit Origin Ltd disclosed today that it has secured strategic financing to delve into the realms of AI computing and data center services. With a significant investment of $10 million, the company is gearing up to explore opportunities for growth and innovation in these sectors. This move signifies Bit Origin Ltd's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements and catering to the evolving needs of its clientele. The infusion of funds is expected to propel the company's expansion efforts and enhance its capabilities in the realm of AI computing and data center services.

data.title: PLUMAS BANCORP DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
data.description: Today, in Reno, Nevada, Plumas Bancorp (Nasdaq:PLBC), the parent company of Plumas Bank, declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 1, 2026.

data.title: First Solar, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: First Solar, Inc. will release its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Investors can participate in the conference call on the same day at 4:30 PM ET. The live webcast will be accessible at investor.firstsolar.com, with a replay available until Saturday, May 30, 2026, on the Investors section of the Company's website. First Solar, Inc. operates under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: FSLR.

data.title: Ninja® Launches Limited-Edition Luxe Café Color Collection, Including First-Ever David Beckham Collaboration
data.description: The company Ninja® has introduced a new limited-edition Luxe Café Color Collection in Needham, Massachusetts. This collection includes a collaboration with David Beckham, marking the first-ever partnership between the two. The release is expected to attract significant attention from consumers and industry followers.

data.title: LUXE Bidet's April Fools Joke Is a Lo-Fi Album to Poop to and It Bops
data.description: LUXE Bidet, a leading bidet brand in America, recently released an unexpected yet much-welcomed creation: Lofi Beats by LUXE Bidet. This innovative 20-track album is set to enhance study sessions and relaxation moments. As the top-selling bidet brand in the country, LUXE Bidet continues to surprise its audience with unique offerings.

data.title: Penn Foster Wins National Marketing Honors for Reaching the Next Generation of Nontraditional Learners
data.description: Penn Foster was recognized in the 41st Annual Educational Advertising Awards for their successful integrated campaigns aimed at engaging new audiences through various digital platforms. The event took place in Phoenix on April 16, 2026. Penn Foster received multiple accolades showcasing their innovative approach to reaching audiences across emerging digital channels. The awards highlight the impact of their campaigns on attracting new audiences and expanding their reach in the educational sector.

data.title: DAV Launches Digital Resource on Psychedelic Therapy for Veterans
data.description: In Erlanger, Kentucky, on April 16, 2026, DAV (Disabled American Veterans) introduced a new online platform aimed at informing veterans, caregivers, and the general public about psychedelic-assisted treatments for mental health issues linked to their military service. This initiative comes as an increasing amount of veterans are turning to these therapies for support and healing.
